question: How does Xinpinmu change Temu's competitive positioning internationally?

findings.claim: Temu's global GMV/sales reached approximately $92.5 billion in 2025, with projections of 35-40% growth in 2026
findings.data: Temu generated revenue of US$92,514m on temu.com in 2025, with projections indicating a 35-40% increase in 2026. First-half 2024 sales of $20B already exceeded entire 2023 performance of $18B. 2024 estimated at $70.8B.

findings.claim: Temu now operates almost entirely on semi-managed model, with 80% of orders from semi-managed sellers
findings.data: Semi-managed orders now represent 80% of sales. Up to 70% of platform traffic is shifting toward semi-managed SKUs. Temu prioritizes semi-managed products in both homepage exposure and search results.

findings.claim: Temu operates 13 self-owned warehouses globally: 10 in Europe, 2 in US, 1 in Mexico
findings.data: Temu has built physical infrastructure with 13 self-owned warehouses globally (10 in Europe, 2 in US, 1 in Mexico). US warehouses projected to handle 15-20% of total US goods volume in 2025, rising to 20-25% by 2026. US warehouse locations: California/LA, Texas/Dallas-Fort Worth, New Jersey/Newark.

findings.claim: Temu achieved 24% cross-border e-commerce market share globally in 2025, matching Amazon
findings.data: According to International Post Corporation (IPC) data published January 2026, Temu increased its share of cross-border ecommerce sales to 24% in 2025, up from less than 1% in 2022. Temu became the most-used cross-border ecommerce seller alongside Amazon. Shein held 9%, AliExpress 8%.

findings.claim: Temu's EU GMV projected to exceed $15B in 2025 and $20B by end of 2026
findings.data: Temu's EU GMV is projected to exceed $15 billion in 2025 and could surpass $20 billion by the end of 2026, which would make it one of the top online marketplaces in Europe. By 2026, Temu is expected to be among the top 5 e-commerce platforms in Europe.

findings.claim: PDD Holdings FY2025 revenue grew 10% YoY to RMB 431.8B; net income fell 11% to RMB 99.4B
findings.data: Q4 2025 revenue: RMB 123.9B (+12% YoY). FY2025 revenue: RMB 431,845.7M (+10% YoY). Transaction services revenue: RMB 63.9B (+19% YoY). Marketing services grew only 5%. Net income fell from RMB 112.4B to RMB 99.4B. Operating margin fell to 24% from 25%. Cash position: RMB 422.3B (US$60.4B).
